documents.content: App Name: Basic App. Type: React Native Expo Application. Description: A mobile application built with Expo, React Native, and Node.js backend.
API Endpoint: POST /signup. Description: No description available. File: auth.js.
API Endpoint: POST /login. Description: No description available. File: auth.js.
API Endpoint: GET /me. Description: No description available. File: auth.js.
API Endpoint: POST /ask. Description: Ask a question about the app. File: rag.js.
API Endpoint: GET /overview. Description: Get app overview. File: rag.js.
API Endpoint: POST /search. Description: Search documents. File: rag.js.
API Endpoint: POST /reindex. Description: Reindex data (admin endpoint). File: rag.js.
API Endpoint: GET /status. Description: Get system status. File: rag.js.

File: backend\.env. Language: Unknown. Preview: PORT=5001
MONGODB_URI=mongodb://localhost:27017/auth_app
JWT_SECRET=your_super_secret_jwt_key_change_this_in_production
JWT_EXPIRE=7d
GEMINI_API_KEY=gen-lang-client-0206254744
